suite: Lunch Up CRM agent swarm readiness

scenarios.goal: A new AI agent can identify entrypoints, setup commands, data boundaries and guardrails from machine-readable files.
Canonical SQLite data and CRM launch package are internally coherent.
Agent instructions and readiness scan prevent committing live tokens or CRM share keys.
Orchestrator has iteration limits, approval gates, rollback and disjoint write-scope rules.
Client catalog and CRM catalog remain tied to the same SQLite product source.
Another agent can deploy to VPS and restore from backup docs without guessing.
